raw.subject: Something I noticed about Nails & Spa Center
raw.body:
Hi,

Happy Memorial Day to everyone. We are OPEN today caught my attention. But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for customers to find and book your services.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/nails-spa-center-roanoke

Would you be open to a quick call to discuss how a simple website could help you grow your business? As a local business owner, I work on a flat fee that fits your budget. Let me know when you're free to talk.
